title: Plug Power Announces Key Strategic Milestones and Continued Margin Improvement in Q3 2024
text: Plug Power announced key strategic milestones and continued margin improvement in the third quarter of 2024. The company reported revenue of $173.7 million, representing an inflection in electrolyzer deployments and continued expansion of its internally produced hydrogen network. Gross Margin Loss decreased 37% quarter-over-quarter, driven by multiple revenue streams. Equipment margins improved 42%, service improved 776%, Power Purchase Agreements improved 13%, and fuel improved 9%. The company recorded an EPS loss of $0.25 for Q3 2024, compared to $0.36 for Q2 2024. Operating Cash Flows improved 31% quarter-over-quarter. Electrolyzer sales increased 285% quarter-over-quarter with 5MW system sales being recognized and revenue from a large-scale order being deployed. The company projected 2024 revenue to range between $700 million and $800 million. Q4 2024 was expected to see significant electrolyzer deployments continue.
